tree.name: Kristaps Porzingis
tree.tradeDescription: GSW traded Jonathan Kuminga and Buddy Hield to ATL for Kristaps Porzingis

assetsGivenUp.name: Jonathan Kuminga
assetsGivenUp.note: G League Ignite forward, drafted 7th overall by GSW using pick acquired from Minnesota in Andrew Wiggins trade

assetsGivenUp.name: 2021 1st Round Pick (#7) via MIN
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from MIN in Andrew Wiggins trade (GSW sent D'Angelo Russell, Jacob Evans, Omari Spellman)

assetsGivenUp.name: D'Angelo Russell
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Sign-and-trade: GSW signed Kevin Durant as FA and traded him with 2025 2nd to BKN for D'Angelo Russell, Treveon Graham, and Shabazz Napier

assetsGivenUp.name: Kevin Durant
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as free agent from Oklahoma City Thunder

assetsGivenUp.name: Omari Spellman
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: GSW traded Damian Jones and a 2026 2nd round pick to ATL for Omari Spellman

assetsGivenUp.name: Damian Jones
assetsGivenUp.note: Vanderbilt center, drafted 30th overall by Golden State

assetsGivenUp.name: 2026 2nd Round Pick
assetsGivenUp.note: GSW own 2nd rounder sent to Atlanta

assetsGivenUp.name: Buddy Hield
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 6-team sign-and-trade: GSW sent Klay Thompson to DAL, received Hield from PHI and Anderson from MIN
assetsGivenUp.note: Oklahoma guard, signed 2yr/$21M via first 6-team trade in NBA history

assetsGivenUp.name: Klay Thompson
assetsGivenUp.note: Washington State guard, drafted #11 overall by Golden State. 4x NBA champion. Left via sign-and-trade to Dallas after 13 seasons.
